description: Single-image face detection. Point in0 at an image file (.jpg/.png); face_detect detects, aligns, and embeds each face and writes them to faces.jsonl. Analysis-only — an input plus one processor, no encoder or muxer (set output_file to an absolute path when running by hand). Requires a with_onnx build and bundled models (MEDIAMOLDER_FACE_MODELS).
